title: Cobblemon Sanctuary
description: The carefully curated modpack made specifically for the Cobblemon Sanctuary SMP, focused on both performance and gameplay!
body:
## Official modpack for Cobblemon Sanctuary SMP.

Welcome to Cobblemon Sanctuary, This pack includes the required mods, tuned settings, and curated resource packs used on the server to keep everything running smoothly and looking the way it’s meant to. If you wish to join the SMP please join the discord server or visit twitch.tv/sylven_vt!
